query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `system_health_events` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `eventType` enum('error','auto_correction','warning','info') NOT NULL,
  `severity` enum('info','warning','error','critical') NOT NULL,
  `subsystem` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'server',
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `details` json,
  `autoCorrectAttempted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `autoCorrectSuccess` tinyint(1),
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

  `subsystem` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'server',

  `details` json,
  `autoCorrectAttempted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
